response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song '快眠！安眠！スヤリスト生活' (Kaimin! Anmin! Suyarisuto Seikatsu) from on-screen text. The original composer is credited as Shun Nittame (HANO). Simplified the search string to "快眠！安眠！スヤリスト生活" HANO Japanese and English lyrics to find accurate information and translations for the song. Performed a search for the title and original artist to get the lyrics. Verified the lyrics and performer information.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for a 3D Live show by the VTuber Shirogane Noel, followed by a performance of the song 'Kaimin! Anmin! Suyarisuto Seikatsu', originally the opening theme for the anime 'Sleepy Princess in the Demon Castle'.

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel performs the song 'Kaimin! Anmin! Suyarisuto Seikatsu'. On-screen text includes song title and creator credits.
scenes.song_title: 快眠！安眠！スヤリスト生活
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
目指せよ快眠
勝ち取れ安眠
いざ夢の世界へ
理想の眠りを求めて
さあ始めよう
おやすみ
(ノンレム睡眠レム睡眠)
私は囚われの姫
魔王の城の中で
独り閉じ込められては
毎日ひたすらに眠ってます
今宵も 布団に入り
栖夜スヤリスト生活
枕もシーツも
硬くて眠れない
(君も寝具にしてやろうか！)
目指せよ快眠
勝ち取れ安眠
いざ夢の世界へ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Aim for a good sleep
Win a good sleep
Let's go to the world of dreams
Seeking the ideal sleep
Come on, let's start
Good night
(Non-REM sleep, REM sleep)
I am a captured princess
Inside the Demon King's castle
Being trapped alone
I sleep intently every day
Tonight too, getting into my futon
Sleepy princess life
My pillow and sheets are
Too hard, I can't sleep
(Shall I make you into bedding too!)
Aim for a good sleep
Win a good sleep
Let's go to the world of dreams

scenes.description: Introductory graphic with 3D Live show details, followed by celestial animations.
